zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Arundell於大約1460年出生在英國可瓦爾藍黑爾時，她的父親Sir John Arundell VIII of Bideford41歲，母親Catherine Chidiock38歲。她和William Capel至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1519年在英國倫敦享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 瑪格麗特 洛斯賀波利 煙雨 聖 克里斯托弗 勒 斯托可斯 安德 聖 巴沙洛繆 白 馮 艾可昌。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret Arundell于大约1460年出生在英国可瓦爾藍黑爾时，她的父亲Sir John Arundell VIII of Bideford41岁，母亲Catherine Chidiock38岁。她和William Capel至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1519年在英国倫敦享年60岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦聖 瑪格麗特 洛斯賀波利 煙雨 聖 克里斯托弗 勒 斯托可斯 安德 聖 巴沙洛繆 白 馮 艾可昌。

nameMeanings.name: Arundell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Arundel
meanings: (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French arondel ‘little swallow’ (a diminutive of arond ‘swallow’, from Latin hirundo).

habitational name from a place so named in West Sussex, from Old English hārhūne ‘horehound’ (a wild plant, Marrubium vulgare) + dell ‘valley’. This place is the seat of the dukes of Norfolk. In northern England, folk etymology resulted in variants such as Arendale .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Arundell was born about 1460, in Lanherne, Cornwall, England, her father, Sir John Arundell VIII of Bideford, was 41 and her mother, Catherine Chidiock, was 38. She had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with William Capel. She died in 1519, in London, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in St Margaret Lothbury with St Christopher le Stocks and St Bartholomew by the Exchange, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.St. Bartholomew the Little, London, Engl: St Margaret Lothbury with St Christopher le Stocks and St Bartholomew by the Exchange, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Arundell est née environ 1460, à Lanherne, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Arundell VIII of Bideford, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Catherine Chidiock, avait 38 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec William Capel. Elle est décédée en 1519, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à St Margaret Lothbury with St Christopher le Stocks and St Bartholomew by the Exchange, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.St. Bartholomew the Little, London, Engl: St Margaret Lothbury with St Christopher le Stocks and St Bartholomew by the Exchange, London, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret Arundell um 1460 in Lanherne, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Arundell VIII of Bideford 41 und ihre Mutter Catherine Chidiock 38. Sie hatte mit William Capel mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1519 im Alter von 60 Jahren in London, England und wurde in St Margaret Lothbury with St Christopher le Stocks and St Bartholomew by the Exchange, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Arundell è nata il circa 1460 nel Lanherne, Cornwall, England, sua padre, Sir John Arundell VIII of Bideford, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Catherine Chidiock, aveva 38 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con William Capel. Morì nel 1519, nel London, England, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a St Margaret Lothbury with St Christopher le Stocks and St Bartholomew by the Exchange, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Arundellが約1460年にイギリスコルンワルランハーンで生まれた時，父Sir John Arundell VIII of Bidefordは41歳，母Catherine Chidiockは38歳であった。彼女はWilliam Capelとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1519年にイギリスロンドンで60歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンスト マーガレット ロスブリー ウィス スト チリストフエル ル ストクス アンド スト バーソロメウ ビー ス エクスチャンッジにて埋葬された。

ko.St. Bartholomew the Little, London, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 마거릿 로스버이 위스 스트 크리스토퍼 일 스톡스 앤드 스트 바토롬w 비 테 스창
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Arundell(이)가 대략 1460년 영국 코른월 랜헤른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Arundell VIII of Bideford(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Chidiock(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 William Capel(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1519년 영국 런던에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 마거릿 로스버이 위스 스트 크리스토퍼 일 스톡스 앤드 스트 바토롬w 비 테 스창에 묻혔다.

Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com William Capel. Ela faleceu em 1519, em London, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em St Margaret Lothbury with St Christopher le Stocks and St Bartholomew by the Exchange, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St. Bartholomew the Little, London, Engl: ст маргарет лотбури вит ст кристофир л стоккс анд ст бартоломю би т эксчанг, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Arundell родилась около 1460 г. в местности ланирн, корнвалл, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Arundell VIII of Bideford было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Catherine Chidiock, 38. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от William Capel. Она умерла в 1519 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности ст маргарет лотбури вит ст кристофир л стоккс анд ст бартоломю би т эксчанг, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
